description_long: This lounge object features a modern, minimalist L-shaped design with a low profile and clean lines, making it suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings. The main body is upholstered in a smooth, light purple fabric, with a single continuous seat cushion extending along both the longer and shorter sections. The backrest is straight and runs along the longer side, providing support for reclining or sitting, while the shorter section functions as a chaise lounge. There are no visible armrests, giving the piece an open and accessible appearance. The base is solid and appears to be constructed from a sturdy material, with no visible legs, suggesting a platform-style support. The upholstery is solid in color with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, L-shaped lounge in light purple with a single seat cushion, straight backrest, and no armrests, featuring a solid, platform-style base and smooth upholstery.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, single seat cushion, and straight backrest along the longer side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise section and the absence of armrests, with the backrest visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the backrest and the solid, continuous base.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, emphasizing the open end of the lounge and the platform base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion spanning both the main and chaise sections, attached and flush with the base.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest running along the longer section, with a simple, unsegmented structure and no visible tufting or curvature.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; solid platform base with full contact to the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color, smooth upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
